title: wissadula subpeltata
intro: Wissadula subpeltata is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae and is commonly known as a tropical herb or weed. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Wissadula subpeltata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Wissadula subpeltata can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
